entity.label: Madmen
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Ibid., a Moabite town threatened with the sword of the Babylonians (Jer. 48:2).

nodes.label: Madmen
nodes.description: Ibid., a Moabite town threatened with the sword of the Babylonians (Jer. 48:2).

verses.text: There shall be no more praise of Moab: in Heshbon they have devised evil against it; come, and let us cut it off from being a nation. Also thou shalt be cut down, O Madmen; the sword shall pursue thee.
